N/currentRecord.description: Access current record in client scripts

N/file.description: Read, create, and delete files in the File Cabinet

N/format.description: Parse and format dates, numbers, and currencies

N/runtime.description: Access script, session, and user context

N/url.description: Resolve URLs for records, scripts, and task links

N/redirect.description: Redirect users to records, suitelets, and search results

N/render.description: Render PDFs, email templates, and print records

N/xml.description: Parse, validate, and transform XML documents

N/task.description: Schedule scripts, CSV imports, and async tasks

N/ui/serverWidget.description: Build Suitelet forms, assistants, and lists

N/crypto.description: Hashing, HMAC, encryption, and password checking

N/encode.description: Encode and decode strings (Base64, UTF-8, hex)

N/auth.description: Change email and password for current user

unmappedApis.reason: No direct SS2.1 method; native JavaScript handles this
unmappedApis.workaround: Use native JavaScript: var d = new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate() + days);

unmappedApis.reason: No direct SS2.1 method; native JavaScript handles this
unmappedApis.workaround: Use native JavaScript: var d = new Date(); d.setMonth(d.getMonth() + months);

unmappedApis.reason: Functionality split across N/crypto (hashing/HMAC) and N/encode (encoding)
unmappedApis.workaround: Use N/crypto module for hashing and encryption, N/encode module for Base64/hex encoding

unmappedApis.reason: Mapping not intuitive (global function to module)
unmappedApis.workaround: Use getCurrentSublistValue() then format.parse() and format.format() from N/format module for timezone conversion

unmappedApis.reason: Mapping not intuitive (global function to module)
unmappedApis.workaround: Use getValue() then format.parse() and format.format() from N/format module for timezone conversion

unmappedApis.reason: Mapping not intuitive (global function to module)
unmappedApis.workaround: Use getSublistValue() then format.parse() and format.format() from N/format module

unmappedApis.ss1Signature: nlapiSendFax(author, recipient, subject, body, records, attachments)
unmappedApis.workaround: Use third-party fax integration or custom solution

unmappedApis.reason: Mapping not intuitive (global function to module)
unmappedApis.workaround: Use format.format() from N/format module to format the datetime string, then setCurrentSublistValue()

unmappedApis.reason: Mapping not intuitive (global function to module)
unmappedApis.workaround: Use format.format() from N/format module to format the datetime string, then setValue()

unmappedApis.reason: Mapping not intuitive (global function to module)
unmappedApis.workaround: Use format.format() from N/format module to format the datetime string, then setSublistValue()

unmappedApis.reason: Functionality no longer needed; SS2.1 Map/Reduce scripts handle yielding automatically
unmappedApis.workaround: Use Map/Reduce script type which automatically yields. Not required for Scheduled Scripts either.

unmappedApis.reason: Functionality no longer needed; SS2.1 Map/Reduce scripts handle yielding automatically
unmappedApis.workaround: Use Map/Reduce script type which automatically yields. Check runtime.getCurrentScript().getRemainingUsage() for governance.
